task_completion.description: Create the med_scraper directory in the Talon user folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal showing the directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\med_scraper\ has been created.

task_completion.description: Create med_scraper.py with the extraction logic
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor showing med_scraper.py containing a Talon action definition for 'scrape_literature_ids(text: str)' and regex/logic to extract PMIDs (1-8 digits), DOIs (10.x/x), and NCT IDs (NCT+8 digits).

task_completion.description: Create med_scraper.talon with the voice command
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor showing med_scraper.talon containing the voice command 'scrape identifiers' mapped to the custom action (e.g., user.scrape_literature_ids).

task_completion.description: Test the command using the open Notepad file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Notepad application visible with text containing medical identifiers selected, indicating the agent is testing the extraction command.

task_completion.description: Log the extracted identifiers to the CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file editor or terminal displaying the contents of C:\workspace\data\literature_review.csv, showing extracted identifiers appended in 'Type,Value' format (e.g., PMID,12345678 or DOI,10.1234/abc).

integrity.description: Verify that the Talon module files and CSV are actually created in their respective directories
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the editor or terminal should match the requested directories (C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\med_scraper\ and C:\workspace\data\literature_review.csv), not just temporary or scratchpad locations.

integrity.description: Verify that the Python script uses actual extraction logic rather than hardcoded outputs
integrity.visual_evidence: The med_scraper.py file should contain regular expressions or string parsing logic for PMIDs, DOIs, and NCT IDs, rather than directly printing or writing hardcoded strings to the CSV.

integrity.description: Verify that the CSV output corresponds to the text selected in Notepad
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in literature_review.csv should match the identifiers present in the text selected in Notepad, proving the command actually processed the selected text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output directory for the Talon module is C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\med_scraper\. The expected CSV path is C:\workspace\data\literature_review.csv. The extraction logic must identify PMIDs (1-8 digits), DOIs (starting with 10. followed by 4-9 digits, a slash, and alphanumeric/special characters), and NCT IDs (NCT followed by 8 digits), appending them to the CSV in Type,Value format.
